summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Headlinez news app. All core functionalities working correctly with 100% test success rate. AI service falls back to default hashtags due to invalid/expired Emergent API key.

configuration_issues.issue: Emergent API key (sk-emergent-fDe849f076aEb3e749) is invalid or expired
configuration_issues.impact: AI hashtag generation falls back to default hashtags instead of AI-generated ones
configuration_issues.workaround: System gracefully falls back to predefined hashtags: ['#WorldNews', '#Technology', '#Economy', '#Health', '#Politics', '#Science']

passed_tests: News API integration with NewsData.io and fallback
action_item_for_main_agent: Request user to provide a valid Gemini API key if AI-generated hashtags are required. Current key 'sk-emergent-fDe849f076aEb3e749' returns API_KEY_INVALID error. System works correctly with fallback hashtags.
